headline: Hugo Ekitike
body: It’s been a long, painful few months for Hugo Ekitike. He’ll be devastated watching France edge towards glory at the World Cup. And he’s lost valuable time at LFC But, despite suffering one of the worst injuries in football, there’s finally light at the end of the tunnel. And, he’s young enough to bounce back: nytimes.com/athletic/7430706… Link Hugo Ekitike has a long road ahead but has a reason to smile — walking naturally again (Gift... Hugo Ekitike is walking again unassisted after an Achilles injury but there are months of rehabilitation still ahead for the striker nytimes.com
raw_text:
It’s been a long, painful few months for Hugo Ekitike.

He’ll be devastated watching France edge towards glory at the World Cup.

And he’s lost valuable time at #LFC 

But, despite suffering one of the worst injuries in football, there’s finally light at the end of the tunnel. And, he’s young enough to bounce back: 

nytimes.com/athletic/7430706…
